name: SBI Card MILES
exclusions: transactions excluded under SBI Card reward terms
milestoneBenefits: 1 additional domestic lounge visit on every Rs 1 lakh spend, up to 8 additional visits per year
5,000 bonus Travel Credits on annual spends of Rs 5 lakh
Annual fee reversal on annual spends of Rs 6 lakh
additionalBenefits: 1,500 Travel Credits on spends of Rs 30,000 within 60 days of card issuance after joining fee payment
2 Travel Credits per Rs 200 spent on travel
1 Travel Credit per Rs 200 spent on other purchases
1 Travel Credit worth up to Rs 1 for air miles or hotel points conversion
1 Travel Credit worth Rs 0.50 for travel bookings
1 Travel Credit worth Rs 0.25 for Shop & Smile catalogue products
4 complimentary domestic lounge visits every year, capped at 2 visits per quarter
Complimentary Priority Pass membership worth USD 99 for first 2 years
1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions from Rs 500 to Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 250 per month
